emails.subject: Financial Trading Agreements Database
emails.body: Financial Trading Agreements Database Mike, Mary Cook is a new attorney that joined our Group yesterday. Can you get her full access to the referenced database, and let us know when such access is granted. Thanks!

emails.body: Mike, I attempted to give Edmund Manager access by doing one of those security requests today. I don't know if you need to do anything or not here.... Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 03/20/2001 12:46 PM Edmund Cooper 03/20/2001 11:41 AM

emails.subject: RE: Financial Trading Agreements database
emails.body: RE: Financial Trading Agreements database Tana: As soon as you get confirmation that your request has been completed, please let Edmund know so he can update/replace the London documents in the Financial Trading Agreements Database. Edmund: I'm not sure who in the London office currently takes care of Notes apps, but try David De-Coi or Gary Gleeson. They (or whomever has taken over the administration function for Notes; I'm sure if its not them, they will know who...) can have the old London copy of the Financial Trading Agreements database removed from the ECTLON-LN2 server. Let me know if you have any questions. Regards, Mike
